creator: linimon@lonesome.com
text:
----- Forwarded message from Colin Percival <cperciva@freebsd.org> -----

Date: Sat, 19 Jan 2013 19:15:05 -0800
From: Colin Percival <cperciva@freebsd.org>
To: Silanty Kr-skih <silanty@dux.su>
Cc: freebsd-ports-bugs@FreeBSD.org
Subject: Re: bin/175251: portsnap(8): portsnap update is corrupt
User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (X11; FreeBSD amd64;
	rv:16.0) Gecko/20121014 Thunderbird/16.0.1

This should be fixed now -- there was a short glitch (~2 hours) where
portsnap was distributing empty INDEX files.

-- 
Colin Percival
Security Officer Emeritus, FreeBSD | The power to serve
Founder, Tarsnap | www.tarsnap.com | Online backups for the truly paranoid

----- End forwarded message -----
